name: CEO Selftest File Creation
summary: Create state/ceo-selftest.txt containing exactly the single line 'hello from the ceo pipeline' with no trailing newline or extra content. Single mechanical task.
goal: Create a file state/ceo-selftest.txt containing exactly the line 'hello from the ceo pipeline' and nothing else. Tiny task - one role, minimal effort.
refined: Create a file at the path state/ceo-selftest.txt that contains exactly the single line 'hello from the ceo pipeline' with no additional content, no trailing newlines, and nothing else.

roles.title: File Writer
roles.mission: Goal: Create a file at path state/ceo-selftest.txt containing EXACTLY the single line 'hello from the ceo pipeline' with no trailing newline, no leading/trailing whitespace, and no additional content. Steps: (1) Ensure the state/ directory exists (create it if needed). (2) Write the file using a method that guarantees no trailing newline, e.g. printf 'hello from the ceo pipeline' > state/ceo-selftest.txt (NOT echo, which appends a newline). (3) Verify with: wc -c state/ceo-selftest.txt — the byte count MUST be exactly 27. (4) Verify content with: xxd state/ceo-selftest.txt or od -c to confirm no trailing 0a byte. Constraints: The file must contain exactly 27 bytes; the last byte must be the letter 'e' (0x65), NOT a newline. Definition of done: state/ceo-selftest.txt exists, `wc -c` reports 27, and the raw bytes equal the ASCII of 'hello from the ceo pipeline' with nothing before or after. When done, record what you learned: python hermes/hermes.py note "<problem>" "<solution>" --tags mission
roles.result: Done. File `state/ceo-selftest.txt` created with exactly 27 bytes, no trailing newline, and content verified. Hermes note recorded.
